items.title: This oil services stock had a tremendous run. Trading its options may be a wiser move right now
items.description: Although this oil services company has been a strong performer, it hasn't grown anywhere near as quickly as its share price.

items.title: Bitcoin's drawdown hit 50%. History shows it may have further to go
items.description: Bitcoin has a history of falling about 75% during each four-year cycle, suggesting the token is on track to fall even further in the near future.

items.title: Mizuho, TD Cowen upgrade Shopify, say AI fears are overdone and LLM strategy builds long-term value
items.description: Mizuho and TD Cowen respectively see Shopify rallying 26% and 34%.

items.title: Wall Street sees more upside for McDonald’s after strong earnings beat
items.description: For the most part, Wall Street analysts remained bullish on McDonald's following its fourth-quarter earnings and revenue beat.

items.title: JPMorgan downgrades Kraft Heinz, says it faces limited near-term upside after breakup pause
items.description: JPMorgan's revised forecast implies a 12% downside for shares of Kraft Heinz.
